english: to develop further / to advance / to evolve
notes: Separable verb (weiter- + entwickeln). Can also be used reflexively (sich weiterentwickeln) meaning 'to develop oneself / to evolve', but the non-reflexive transitive use is equally common.

sentences.german: Das Unternehmen möchte seine Produkte weiterentwickeln.
sentences.english: The company wants to develop its products further.

sentences.german: Die Technologie hat sich in den letzten Jahren stark weiterentwickelt.
sentences.english: The technology has advanced significantly in recent years.
